# Adam's Autoshine — Professional Mobile Car Detailing
# Gloucester County, New Jersey

> Adam's Autoshine is a professional mobile car detailing service based in Mullica Hill, NJ, serving all of Gloucester County and South Jersey.

## Services
- Exterior Detailing: Hand wash, clay bar treatment, polish, wax, tire & rim cleaning
- Interior Detailing: Deep vacuum, steam cleaning, leather conditioning, odor elimination
- Ceramic Coating: 2-5 year paint protection, UV & chemical resistant, hydrophobic finish
- Paint Correction: Swirl mark removal, scratch repair, color restoration
- Engine Bay Cleaning: Safe degreasing, component protection, dressing & shine
- Headlight Restoration: Haze removal, UV sealant, improved visibility

## Pricing (Starting At)
- Basic Shine: $79.99 (sedan/coupe base) — Exterior hand wash, tire shine, windows, vacuum
- Premium Detail: $149.99 (sedan/coupe base) — Full interior + exterior, leather conditioning, carpet shampoo
- Ultimate Package: $249.99 (sedan/coupe base) — Everything plus clay bar, paint correction, engine bay, headlights
- SUV/Crossover/Truck: +$30–$50 above base
- XL vehicles (full-size truck, van, 3-row SUV): +$50–$80 above base
- Condition surcharge for heavy pet hair, excessive dirt, or smoke odor: $25–$75

## Service Area
Primary: Washington Township, Mullica Hill, Turnersville, Sewell, Deptford, Glassboro, Williamstown, Monroe Township, Woolwich Township
Secondary: Mantua, Pitman, Swedesboro, West Deptford, Harrison Township, Woodbury, Woodbury Heights, Wenonah, Franklinville, Clayton, Mickleton, National Park, Paulsboro, Logan Township, Elk Township, East Greenwich Township
Regional: Cherry Hill, Sicklerville, Blackwood, South Jersey, Delaware Valley

## Contact
- Phone: (856) 305-0623
- Website: https://www.adamsautoshine.com
- Booking: https://www.adamsautoshine.com/#booking
- Mobile service — we come to you anywhere in Gloucester County

## Hours
- Monday–Friday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## About
Adam's Autoshine is a locally owned mobile detailing business proudly serving Gloucester County, New Jersey. We use professional-grade, eco-friendly products and deliver results that exceed expectations. Every vehicle is treated with meticulous attention to detail, honest pricing, and care as if it were our own. We are fully insured and IDA certified.

## Payment
Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, cash, Venmo, Zelle. Payment collected after service is completed.
